title: Post misrepresents executive order as election takeover | Fact check
shortDescription: The executive order doesn't mention anything about suspending elections. It revokes executive orders on COVID-19 deemed no longer necessary by Biden.

title: Arizona Senate votes to repeal near-total abortion ban
shortDescription: The 1864 law bans abortions in all situations except life-threatening medical emergencies and could impose prison terms for doctors and others who aid in an abortion.

title: Obama blasts Trump for not being considered a 'serious guy' in New York
shortDescription: Former President Barack Obama knocked ex-President Donald Trump in an interview, saying he wasn't considered a “serious guy” in New York.

title: Marjorie Taylor Greene plans to oust Speaker Mike Johnson
shortDescription: Reps. Marjorie Taylor Greene and Thomas Massie announced plans to oust Republican speaker.

title: OnPolitics: Marjorie Taylor Greene moves to oust Mike Johnson
shortDescription: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, R-Ga., said on Wednesday she's calling up a vote next week to oust House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La.

title: NH delegates for Biden will count. But what about 2028 primary?
shortDescription: Granite State Democrats shouldn't celebrate: the DNC’s decision doesn't mean New Hampshire will be the first primary officially again in 2028.

title: What's the GOP House majority after NY special elections?
shortDescription: House Speaker Mike Johnson can only spare one Republican on a party-line vote as the GOP majority shrinks to just 217-213.

title: Democrat Tim Kennedy wins New York special election for House seat
shortDescription: Big wins for Democrats in the Empire State means House Speaker Mike Johnson's majority just got smaller.

title: RFK Jr. asks Biden to agree to 'no-spoiler' pledge to defeat Trump
shortDescription: Independent presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy proposed a 'no-spoiler' pledge with Biden as polls show he is taking some voters from Trump.

title: Post passes off old Der Spiegel cover of Trump as 'current' | Fact check
shortDescription: The illustration and related story did not appear on Der Spiegel's cover in April 2024, as the post claims. The post recycles an old image.

title: Trump to hold a fundraiser with special guest J.D. Vance this month
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump is set to hold a fundraiser with Sen. J. D. Vance, R-Ohio, May 15 in Cincinnati, Ohio.

title: Is Trump in court today? Latest on witness testimony in hush money trial
shortDescription: Lawyers wrapped up testimony Tuesday from banker Gary Farro, who oversaw Michael Cohen's accounts when he made the payment to Stormy Daniels.

title: Mike Johnson's job in jeopardy after MTG vows vote for ouster
shortDescription: Conservative firebrand Marjorie Taylor Greene is following through on her warning to call a vote next week to oust Mike Johnson from the speakership.

title: Are Florida's book bans in schools constitutional? Judge isn't convinced.
shortDescription: Over the last couple of years, Gov. Ron DeSantis and the GOP-led Legislature have passed laws that have led to numerous book restrictions in schools.

title: What the public can't see: Inside the Trump New York hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump's New York criminal trial isn't televised. From famous faces to a "freezing" former president, here's what it's like in the courtroom.

title: Judges nix Louisiana congressional map with second Black district
